{{Infobox character
| name = Gerravon
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Gerravon]] is a Silverlord who remembers [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Gerravon]]'s core power is the [[Hundred Hands of Terra Mara]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Gerravon]] is the oldest Silverlord in his operation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
